caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with a dark, ribbed acoustic foam wall behind him. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt, which features a logo with the words "Stay Hustled" on the chest. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone attached to a silver boom arm. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and looking slightly to his left. His facial expressions shift as he talks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze remaining fixed off-camera. The camera remains stationary, and there are no other people visible in the scene. The equipment and background remain constant throughout the clip.
